ddls:
CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal species */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the animal species */,
  "domestic" INTEGER /* Whether the animal is domesticated */,
  "catsize" INTEGER /* Whether the animal is similar in size to a cat */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of animal (e.g., mammal, bird, reptile, fish) */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., endangered, threatened, least concern) */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Primary habitat of the species (e.g., forest, ocean, desert) */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Primary diet of the species (e.g., carnivore, herbivore, omnivore) */,
  "lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species in years */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal species the characteristic belongs to */,
  "hair" INTEGER /* Whether the animal has hair */,
  "feathers" INTEGER /* Whether the animal has feathers */,
  "eggs" INTEGER /* Whether the animal lays eggs */,
  "milk" INTEGER /* Whether the animal produces milk */,
  "airborne" INTEGER /* Whether the animal is airborne */,
  "aquatic" INTEGER /* Whether the animal is aquatic */,
  "predator" INTEGER /* Whether the animal is a predator */,
  "toothed" INTEGER /* Whether the animal has teeth */,
  "backbone" INTEGER /* Whether the animal has a backbone */,
  "breathes" INTEGER /* Whether the animal breathes */,
  "venomous" INTEGER /* Whether the animal is venomous */,
  "fins" INTEGER /* Whether the animal has fins */,
  "legs" INTEGER /* Number of legs the animal has */,
  "tail" INTEGER /* Whether the animal has a tail */,
  "weight_kg" TEXT /* Average weight of the species in kilograms */,
  "height_cm" TEXT /* Average height of the species in centimeters */,
  "body_temperature" TEXT /* Average body temperature of the species in degrees Celsius */,
  "gestation_period_days" INTEGER /* Average gestation period in days */,
  "litter_size" INTEGER /* Average size of a litter */,
  "social_structure" TEXT /* Social structure of the species (e.g., solitary, pack, herd) */,
  "migration_pattern" TEXT /* Migration pattern of the species (e.g., migratory, non-migratory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characteristics_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxa" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic rank */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the taxonomic rank (e.g., kingdom, phylum, class) */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the taxon (e.g., kingdom, phylum, class) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the taxonomic rank */,
  "parent_taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent taxon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxon_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic relationship */,
  "parent_taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent taxon */,
  "child_taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child taxon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxon_relationships_child_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_taxon_id") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxon_relationships_parent_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_taxon_id") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_taxa" (
  "animal_taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal taxon classification */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal species the classification belongs to */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxon the animal belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_taxa_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_taxa_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxon_id") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the user's browser or device */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Specific resource or data accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "animal_taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal taxon classification the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_animal_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_taxon_id") REFERENCES animal_taxa ("animal_taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_codes" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the animal type (e.g., mammal, bird, reptile, fish) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
